name: users-fanout
description: Apply a single users.json bundle across every host in the target group, idempotently. Wraps scripts-linux/68-user-mgmt/add-user-from-json.sh on each remote.

inputs.USERS_JSON: Local path to users.json bundle on the controller (uploaded to each host)
inputs.USERMGMT_DIR: Path to scripts-linux/68-user-mgmt/ on each remote (default: /opt/68-user-mgmt)
